title: evax multicaulis var. drummondii
intro: Evax multicaulis var. drummondii, also known as Drummond's evax or prairie evax, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is a flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Evax multicaulis var. drummondii can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
